origin: v0.2 item 1 — the ask-only-what's-unanswered licensing rule (same logic as A6): a field whose answer is already in the prompt must not be asked.
exercises: Deterministic clarify analyzer: prompt-stated answers suppress their fields; grounding tokens suppress the color question; target words (mobile/page/button) suppress the viewport question; constraints is always offered
